## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Augment Code's organic traffic growth strategy and set measurable goals for GrowthX's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current organic traffic is primarily brand-driven; non-brand traffic is minimal](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on increasing non-brand organic traffic through content creation (25 articles/week, 1 newsletter/week)](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Sylvain wants clear, measurable KPIs for GrowthX's efforts, including content output and impact on rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Discussed potential for accelerating growth through strategic backlink acquisition and newsletter subscriber purchases](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Topics

### Current Organic Traffic Analysis

  - [71%+ of organic traffic is brand searches (85,000 clicks/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Non-brand organic traffic is minimal (\~150 clicks/month across 50 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Brand searches have 15x higher click-through rate (33% vs. 2%) and likely higher conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Content Strategy and Goals

  - [Increase non-brand content pages by 100+ per month](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Aim to improve average clicks per page from 3 to 10, 20, then 30 monthly](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [GrowthX to produce \~25 articles/week and 1 newsletter/week](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Focus on low-competition keywords for quicker ranking potential](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

### Newsletter Growth Strategy

  - [Current estimate: 100,000 subscribers, 6% click-through rate](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Goal: Increase subscribers to compound weekly clicks (e.g., 200,000 subscribers = 5,000 clicks/month)](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Potential to purchase subscribers to accelerate growth (20-40K budget discussed)](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

### Measuring Progress and Impact

  - [Track weekly content output (e.g., 10 new blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Monitor Google Search Console data for organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Implement keyword ranking tracking for targeted keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Aim to improve average keyword position (e.g., from current position to top 9)](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

### Competitive Landscape and Domain Authority

  - [Competitor (Kodo.ai) has 4x more backlinks/referring domains](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Discussed potential for strategic backlink acquisition to boost domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [Estimated timeline for significant results: 2-3 months (compressed due to AI industry dynamics)](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

### Budget and Resource Allocation

  - [Sylvain to review budget for potential "growth budget" for backlinks and subscriber acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [GrowthX positioned as "owners" of organic traffic growth strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to finalize and present a C-level ready model/projection by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [Develop a concrete list of target keywords with difficulty and ranking timeline estimates](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Implement weekly progress tracking for content output and impact metrics](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
  - [Sylvain to review budget for potential additional investments in backlinks and subscriber acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin submitting Augment Code to relevant directories for free backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/Rgz5y6y9T11fipf3BBpdMQwNhFzzQavy?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
